tagline: Forty years on Victory. Family-owned, family-run.

hero.heading: Forty years under the hood.
hero.subheading: An independent family-run shop on Victory Boulevard. Diagnostic, brakes, tires, and the kind of write-up your grandfather would have recognized. Free written quote on every job.

about.label: In the bay
about.heading: A family shop. Tools down at five.
paragraphs: Peter's has been on the same corner of South Victory Boulevard since 1985. Same shop, same family, same flat-rate write-ups. The signs on the wall are older than the lifts.

We work on what Burbank drives — daily-driver sedans, family SUVs, the occasional studio-fleet courier. We pass on anything we're not the right shop for, and we'll tell you the name of the place we'd send a friend instead.
Closed Saturday and Sunday on purpose. Two days off a week means no one is rushing the inspection on a Friday at four-thirty.

guarantees.title: Written quote
guarantees.text: Itemized, on paper. The number you sign for is the number on the invoice.

guarantees.title: OEM-first
guarantees.text: We use OEM parts unless you'd rather we don't — and we'll show you the catalog page either way.

guarantees.title: Two-year warranty
guarantees.text: Any repair we perform is covered for 24 months or 24,000 miles, whichever comes first.

guarantees.title: We pick up
guarantees.text: When you call, you get the front desk — not an answering service or a menu tree.

services.title: Diagnostic
services.description: Scope, scan, and a printed report. We tell you the cause before we ever pull a wrench.

services.title: Brakes — pads & rotors
services.description: Pads, rotors, hardware, fluid bleed. Spec-matched for your year, make, and model. Same-day in most cases.

services.title: Tires & alignment
services.description: Four tires mounted and balanced plus a four-wheel alignment. We carry Michelin, Bridgestone, Continental, and Falken.

services.title: Oil + 27-point service
services.description: Synthetic-blend or full-synthetic oil, new filter, top-offs, and a documented twenty-seven-point inspection.

services.title: Cooling system
services.description: Coolant flush, hose check, thermostat replacement if needed, pressure test. We catch leaks before they catch the radiator.

services.title: Pre-purchase inspection
services.description: Buying used? We'll inspect bumper to bumper and email you a PDF before you write the check. About 45 minutes.

reviews.name: Howard B.
reviews.text: I've taken three generations of family cars to Peter's. They've never recommended a service I didn't need, and they've never missed one I did. That's worth a thousand-dollar-a-year insurance policy on its own.

reviews.name: Maritza C.
reviews.context: First visit · referred by a neighbor
reviews.text: Came in for a clicking sound that two chain shops couldn't pin down. Peter's diagnosed it in twenty minutes, fixed it under warranty from the OEM, and didn't charge me a cent.

reviews.name: Bryan T.
reviews.text: Honest shop, honest quotes, honest mechanics. The only place in Burbank I've trusted with the courier fleet for the last six years. They book up two weeks out — plan ahead.
